历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3743→3976→3940→4245→4156. Over the past 5 years, the overall trend shows fluctuation with a backward shift, reaching the highest point of 4245 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 4156 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4156. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 79 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 87, an expansion of about 6.1% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities Ranking, it rose to 50th in 2026 (60th in 2025), with a continuously rising ranking and steadily improving university level and comprehensive strength. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 64 (average evaluation), indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms without abnormal attention signals. It has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, and Software Engineering A-, highlighting outstanding disciplinary strength that closely matches its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly recommended, with strong social attention and application willingness. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4156, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 6.1%, the 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees, and the university's rising ranking, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4358, with a range of 3858–4858.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3858–4858, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 3858), you can focus on reaching for the top Yuan Class flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 4858), you should rely on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
